faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, downgrades take effect at the next billing period.
faq.q2: Is there a trial period for paid plans?
faq.a2: Yes! When upgrading to Pro or Premium, you get a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime if it's not for you.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, as well as Apple Pay and Google Pay.
faq.q4: What happens to my data if I cancel my subscription?
faq.a4: Your data stays on the free plan. Items beyond the limit become unavailable for creating looks but won't be deleted.
